summary: Plan-only classification for three open candidates. #75043 remains the live canonical PR for provider-aware automatic TTS emotion mapping. #82109 is a related tracking/product-boundary issue that should stay open with #75043. #81834 is security-sensitive per the preflight artifact and must be routed to central security handling only.
